name: Utah First
description_short: ERROR: The provided URL is for Utah First Credit Union Amphitheatre, an outdoor concert venue in West Valley City, Utah—not a consumer finance company.
description_long: CRITICAL ISSUE: The website provided (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Utah_First_Credit_Union_Amphitheatre) contains information about an outdoor amphitheater venue, not a financial services company. The Utah First Credit Union Amphitheatre is a 25,000-capacity outdoor performance venue located at 5150 S 6055 West in West Valley City, Utah, that opened in July 2003. It was previously named the USANA Amphitheatre from 2003-2024 before Utah First Credit Union purchased naming rights in January 2024. The venue is operated by Live Nation and hosts concerts from May through October annually, featuring major artists and music festivals. This is fundamentally a music venue and entertainment property, not a financial institution or consumer finance company. While the venue is named after Utah First Credit Union (a legitimate financial institution), the website content provided contains zero information about any financial products, services, lending practices, APRs, fees, or consumer finance offerings. The naming rights agreement indicates only a sponsorship relationship between the credit union and the amphitheater operator. No factual company profile for consumer finance services can be constructed from venue information.
